dict.string: Used to open Terminal so you can run `claude /login` when adding an account.
Copyright © 2026 Thanh Ngô. Licensed under MIT.
Claude Bar 11.9 — menu-bar manager for multiple Claude Code accounts

Web-linked accounts now refresh every 60 seconds (every 30 seconds when active 5h ≥ 80%), instead of waiting 3 minutes per cycle. The web scrape goes through your own claude.ai cookie session via WKWebView so it doesn't share Anthropic's `/usage` rate-limit budget — usage bars and auto-swap react ~3× faster for web-linked accounts. The slower OAuth `/usage` cadence (180s / 120s, user-configurable) is preserved for terminal-only accounts and is also gated separately so the faster outer loop doesn't burn the rate-limited endpoint.

The faster 60s / 30s web-poll loads a hidden WKWebView reload of claude.ai/settings/usage per cycle and waits for the React SPA to hydrate (typically 1–3s, up to ~8s). Expect modestly higher CPU and battery use on machines with several web-linked accounts; the previous 180s cycle is still in effect if no account is web-linked. The menu-bar popover still dismisses when the Rename window opens (macOS menu-bar app behaviour, not preventable without giving up the dropdown style). The rename itself goes through on Save; reopen the menu to see the new name. Existing v11.x Google tokens are still missing the `spreadsheets` scope shipped in 11.3. The cb_gsheets_* tools return Google "insufficient permission" until you Disconnect + Reconnect the Google connector — that mints a fresh token with the new scope set. Drive / Calendar / Gmail tools keep working on the old scope until you do.
